title: Law Is Cornered on Green Bit
description: Pages 1–4 focus on law is cornered on green bit, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Bartolomeo, Cavendish, Colosseum Fighters, Doflamingo Family, Jesus Burgess, Luffy, Unknown person #1 as law faces Doflamingo and Fujitora as the Caesar exchange collapses, while Luffy’s group remains tied up in the Colosseum and Dressrosa’s secrets.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This has been Corrida Colos- Seum's battle Royale!!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: At this time, there are three who've earned the right to chal- large the donquixote family.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: The winner of a-block comes from the black- beard pirate crew...

dialogue.speaker: Jesus Burgess
dialogue.text: It's the "Champion," Jesus Burgess!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: B-block gave us the captain of the Barto Club crew...

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: "The cannibal," Bartolomeo!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: And then there's C-block!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's our Gladiator, Lucy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Only one more fighter will move on to the finals!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: But wait!! The ring has been heavily damaged!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So we regret to inform you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hurry up and fix it!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: that that starting time of D-block will have to be delayed by 15 minutes!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Hang in there! D- Block is coming!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Get the replace-ment ring!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Straw- Hat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You've no longer anywhere to run!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Cabbage!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Duran DAL!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: DAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Cavendish is going wild again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That bastard!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What's up with that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He keeps calling that guy "Strawhat"....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Strawhat... isn't that, uh, you know, that guy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: At the Para- Mount War... the pirate who couldn't save his own brother!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Dahahaha if he just went there to fail, well, even I could have done that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: DOBEHO!! WH...WHAT'S HAPPEN- ING!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Stop it!! You bastard!! I'm a noble from the country of Doelena!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Behaaa!! Cut it out!! You're crushing me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: you... just who do you think you were mocking so flippantly...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...Listen up. Strawhat Luffy-senpai will...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Eees!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: One way or another, he'll stand and bear the weight of this genera- Tion!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He's the future King of the Pirates!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I... I saw it. Two years ago, but also before that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Let go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: As if!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: In the East Blue...! In loguetown!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: On that legend- any execution platform where the pirate King Roger met his end.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Facing certain death, Luffy-senpai shouted out...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'm the man....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Who'll be King of the Pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: and at that instant!! A bolt of lightning dropped from the heavens!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: But it didn't kill that man...!!! I wit- messed nothing less than a miracle!!!

summary: Pages 1–4 focus on law is cornered on green bit, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
